_purpose: 50 ambitious, beautiful, fun web mini-app games and toys spread across the non-three.js libraries the platform now vendors offline: p5.js, Tone.js, pixi.js (v7), matter.js, GSAP, d3 (v7), Chart.js, tsParticles (v2), and canvas-confetti. Each library is auto-vendored offline when an artifact references it, so goals can simply load it via a normal versioned <script src> CDN tag (the B-catch rewrites it to the local vendored copy). 'lane' tags the library family (p5/tone/pixi/matter/d3/chart/gsap/tsparticles/confetti). These are real, complete, interactive experiences with strong vibe/color/motion direction - NOT snake/tetris/wordle clones. Run via runWizard.

entries.goal: Build a mesmerizing flow-field particle toy using p5.js: thousands of tiny particles drifting along a Perlin-noise vector field, painting long luminous trails in a deep-ocean palette of midnight blues, teals, and warm gold highlights. The field slowly evolves over time. Moving the pointer (mouse or touch) bends the flow toward the cursor and seeds a burst of new particles. Fades and additive blending give a soft glowing look. Canvas fills the whole window and resizes.

Build an infinite Perlin-noise terrain flyover using p5.js: a wireframe-and-shaded landscape of rolling hills scrolling toward the viewer like a synthwave dream, in a sunset palette of magenta, purple, and amber with a glowing horizon line. Drag left/right to steer the heading; the terrain regenerates seamlessly. Smooth delta-time scrolling, soft fog in the distance. Fill and resize to the viewport.

Build an interactive recursive fractal tree garden using p5.js: branching trees that grow with organic noise-jittered angles, dappled in soft spring pastels of blush pink, mint, and lavender, with drifting blossom particles. Dragging the pointer left/right sways the branch angle live; clicking plants a new tree at that spot. A gentle breeze animates the leaves. Canvas fills and resizes to the window.

Build a living particle ecosystem toy using p5.js: glowing prey particles flock with simple boids rules while a few larger predators chase them, all in a bioluminescent palette of electric cyan, violet, and deep indigo on near-black. Click or tap to drop food that attracts the swarm; the flock visibly reacts. Soft trails and additive glow. Canvas fills and resizes to the viewport with delta-time motion.

Build a Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion lab using p5.js: organic coral-like and labyrinth patterns blooming across the canvas in a warm palette that maps concentration to amber, coral, and cream on charcoal. Drag the pointer to inject chemical and grow new patterns live; a couple of preset buttons switch between spots, stripes, and mazes. Keep it smooth by using a reasonable grid resolution. Canvas fills and resizes.

Build a symmetric kaleidoscope painter using p5.js: as you drag, your strokes are mirrored into 8 or 12 radial segments forming an ever-evolving mandala, the stroke hue cycling through a jewel-tone rainbow with soft glow. A slider sets the number of mirror segments; a button clears the canvas. Beautiful even with a single gesture. Canvas fills and resizes to the window; works with touch and mouse.

Build a generative poster machine using p5.js: each press of a 'New' button composes a fresh abstract Swiss-style poster - bold geometric shapes, layered grids, and a striking display word, drawn from a curated palette set (bold primaries, muted earth tones, or neon, chosen at random). Everything is procedurally placed yet balanced. A download/save-frame button exports the current poster. Canvas fills and resizes; posters stay crisp.

Build a hyperspace warp starfield using p5.js: stars streaking outward from a central vanishing point with motion-blur trails, accelerating into a warp as you hold the pointer down, in a cool palette of icy white, electric blue, and faint violet on black. Releasing eases back to a calm drift. Pointer position steers the warp center. Smooth delta-time motion; canvas fills and resizes.

Build a Mandelbrot fractal explorer using p5.js: a deep, smoothly-colored fractal you can zoom into by scrolling or pinching and pan by dragging, with a lush gradient palette of deep blue, gold, and ember that cycles with iteration depth. Show the current zoom level. Recompute progressively so it stays responsive. Canvas fills and resizes to the viewport; works with touch and mouse.

Build a silky fluid-paint smear toy using p5.js: dragging the pointer pushes glowing ink that swirls and blends like wet paint, colors mixing in a vivid palette of magenta, cyan, and lime with smooth additive trails. Velocity of the drag controls splash size; a clear button resets the canvas. Idle, the ink slowly settles. Canvas fills and resizes; works with touch and mouse.

Build a northern-lights aurora simulator using p5.js: shimmering vertical curtains of green, teal, and violet light rippling with layered Perlin noise above a dark mountain silhouette and a sprinkle of stars. Dragging the pointer ripples the curtains and shifts the hue. Slow, hypnotic, delta-time motion. Canvas fills and resizes to the window.

Build a spirograph drawing studio using p5.js: animated hypotrochoid and epitrochoid curves tracing intricate looping patterns in real time, the line hue cycling through a candy palette of pink, orange, and teal on cream. Sliders control the two gear radii and the pen offset; the pattern redraws live. A clear and a save button. Canvas fills and resizes to the window.

Build a dreamy playable synth keyboard using Tone.js: a two-octave on-screen keyboard (also playable with the computer keyboard) driving a warm polyphonic synth through lush reverb and delay, with a soft pastel-glass UI in lavender and aqua and animated key glows on each note. Sliders adjust reverb size and filter cutoff. Show a clear 'Tap to start audio' overlay first, because the audio context must unlock on the first tap. Layout fills and resizes; works on touch.

Build a 16-step drum-and-bass beat machine using Tone.js: a glowing grid sequencer with kick, snare, hat, and bass rows, a tempo slider, and play/stop, in a neon-on-dark palette where the active step pulses with light as the playhead sweeps. Click cells to toggle hits; the pattern loops. Show a 'Tap to start' overlay so the audio context unlocks on first interaction. Grid fills and resizes; works on touch.

Build an audio-reactive music visualizer using Tone.js plus its analyser (FFT/waveform): a generative loop of pads and a pulse plays while a radial spectrum of bars and a flowing waveform react to the frequencies, in a fiery palette of orange, magenta, and gold that brightens with volume. A play/pause control and a 'Tap to start' overlay to unlock audio. Canvas fills and resizes; works on touch.

Build a generative ambient soundscape using Tone.js: slowly evolving pads, sparse bell tones, and gentle randomized melodies in a soothing key, paired with a soft animated gradient backdrop of teal-to-violet that breathes with the music. A few mood buttons (calm, dawn, deep) shift the scale and texture. Show a 'Tap to begin' overlay to unlock audio. Fills and resizes; works on touch.

Build a finger-drumming pad machine using Tone.js: a 4x4 grid of big, juicy drum pads (kick, snare, hats, claps, toms, percussion) each with a punchy synthesized sound and a satisfying flash-and-ripple animation when hit, in a bold palette of coral, yellow, and deep purple. Playable by tap and by keyboard keys. Show a 'Tap to start' overlay to unlock audio. Pads are large (mobile-friendly), fill and resize.

Build a hypnotic arpeggiator toy using Tone.js: pick a chord by tapping notes and a glittering arpeggio cascades through it with adjustable rate, pattern (up/down/random), and octave range, over a synthwave UI in hot pink and cyan where each played note lights a ring. A tempo control and a 'Tap to start' overlay to unlock audio. Layout fills and resizes; works on touch.

Build a gesture theremin using Tone.js: move the pointer across a glowing field where horizontal position sets pitch and vertical sets volume, driving a smooth gliding oscillator through reverb, the cursor leaving a luminous comet trail in electric green and blue on black. Show pitch and volume readouts. A 'Tap to start' overlay unlocks audio. Field fills and resizes; works with touch drag.

Build a mouse-reactive star galaxy toy using tsParticles: a deep field of twinkling stars that gently parallax-drift, where moving the pointer attracts nearby stars and clicking spawns a soft bloom, in a cosmic palette of white, pale blue, and faint pink on near-black. Calm, beautiful, ambient. Fills and resizes to the viewport; works on touch.

Build a network-constellation interactive backdrop using tsParticles: floating nodes connected by thin glowing lines that form and break as they drift, the web brightening and grabbing toward the pointer on hover, in a cool palette of cyan and white on deep navy. Clicking adds a burst of new nodes. Elegant and techy. Fills and resizes to the viewport; works on touch.

Build a cozy snow-globe scene using tsParticles: soft snowflakes of varied sizes drifting down with gentle sway over a twilight winter backdrop of deep blue and lilac with a warm glowing cabin window. Moving the pointer creates a breeze that pushes the snow; clicking shakes a flurry. Peaceful and pretty. Fills and resizes to the viewport; works on touch.

Build a delightful celebration toy using canvas-confetti: a big friendly 'Celebrate!' button that fires gorgeous confetti bursts, with extra buttons for different styles (fireworks volley, side cannons, gentle rain, golden shower) and a click-anywhere mode that pops confetti from the pointer, over a warm festive gradient backdrop. Tasteful, joyful, and replayable. Fills and resizes to the viewport; works on touch.

Build an automatic fireworks-finale display using canvas-confetti: timed volleys of colorful firework bursts launching from random points and blooming across a night-sky gradient of deep indigo to black, with a sprinkle of falling sparkle confetti, building to a grand finale loop. Tapping anywhere launches an extra firework at that spot. Beautiful and celebratory. Fills and resizes; works on touch.

Build a soothing bubble-pop toy using tsParticles: translucent iridescent bubbles of many sizes drifting upward with gentle wobble, popping with a satisfying ripple when tapped or hovered, over a soft aqua-to-mint gradient. Bubbles keep spawning so there is always something to pop. Relaxing and tactile. Fills and resizes to the viewport; works on touch.

Build a vibrant bullet-hell arcade shooter using pixi.js (v7): your ship weaves through gorgeous dense patterns of thousands of glowing bullets fired by spiraling enemies, with smooth slow-motion focus, score, lives, and waves, in a neon palette of hot pink, cyan, and gold on black. Drag or arrow-keys to move, hold to focus-fire. Render thousands of sprites efficiently with a particle container. Stage fills and resizes; playable on touch.

Build a gooey metaball blob toy using pixi.js (v7): soft glowing blobs that merge and split organically as they bounce around, leaving smooth liquid trails, in a lava-lamp palette of magenta, orange, and violet on dark. Dragging spawns and flings new blobs; they attract toward the pointer. Mesmerizing and tactile. Stage fills and resizes to the viewport; works on touch.

Build a filter-driven kaleidoscope using pixi.js (v7): a swirling generative texture run through displacement and color-shift filters and mirrored into radial symmetry, blooming into an ever-changing mandala in iridescent jewel tones. Moving the pointer warps the displacement live; a slider sets the symmetry count. Hypnotic and high-fidelity. Stage fills and resizes; works on touch.

Build a GPU particle fountain toy using pixi.js (v7): a fountain spewing tens of thousands of glowing additive-blended sparks that arc up and rain down with gravity, in a palette that shifts from gold to ember to violet. The fountain follows and tilts toward the pointer; clicking erupts a burst. Use a particle container for performance. Stage fills and resizes; works on touch.

Build a juicy neon breakout game using pixi.js (v7): a glowing paddle and ball smashing through colorful brick rows with screen-shake, particle bursts on every hit, power-ups (multi-ball, wide paddle), score and lives, in a synthwave palette of electric pink, cyan, and purple on dark grid. Drag or move the pointer to control the paddle. Stage fills and resizes; playable on touch.

Build a playful sprite swarm arena using pixi.js (v7): thousands of cute bouncing critters fill a sunny meadow stage, and tapping or dragging scatters them away from the pointer in a satisfying wave before they regroup, in a cheerful palette of grass green, sky blue, and warm yellow. A counter shows the live sprite count; a button adds more. Use a particle container so thousands stay at 60fps. Stage fills and resizes; works on touch.

Build a calming animated aquarium using pixi.js (v7): schools of colorful fish gliding with gentle wander behavior, drifting bubbles, swaying kelp, and soft caustic light over a blue-green underwater gradient. Tapping drops food that the fish swim toward and nibble; the pointer gently shoos nearby fish. Beautiful and relaxing. Stage fills and resizes to the viewport; works on touch.

Build a satisfying neon Plinko game using matter.js: drop glowing pucks from the top to bounce through a peg field into scoring slots at the bottom, with a running score, chips/balls counter, and a 'Drop' button plus tap-to-drop-here, in a vibrant arcade palette of electric pink, cyan, and gold on dark. Real physics bounces. Canvas fills and resizes to the viewport; works on touch.

Build a physics tower-toppling game using matter.js: a stack of colorful blocks you knock down by flinging balls (drag to aim and set power, release to launch), scoring for blocks cleared and combo chains, in a bright candy palette on a soft sky gradient. Real toppling, tumbling physics. A reset button rebuilds the tower. Canvas fills and resizes; works on touch.

Build a build-and-watch marble run using matter.js: place ramps and pegs by dragging, then release marbles that cascade, bounce, and roll down through your contraption into a collection bin, in a warm wooden-toy palette with bright marbles. A 'Drop marble' button and a clear button. Real rolling physics. Canvas fills and resizes to the viewport; works on touch.

Build a domino-cascade toy using matter.js: tap or drag to lay rows of dominoes along a path, then press 'Go' to tip the first one and watch a satisfying chain reaction topple them all, in a clean bright palette of bold dominoes on a pale floor. A counter shows how many fell; a reset clears the board. Real physics toppling. Canvas fills and resizes; works on touch.

Build a goofy ragdoll playground using matter.js: a jointed ragdoll character you can grab and fling around a room full of bouncy obstacles, the limbs flopping with believable constraint physics, in a playful cartoon palette of bright primaries on a soft backdrop. Dragging any body part throws it; a reset button stands the ragdoll back up. Canvas fills and resizes to the viewport; works on touch.

Build an angry-birds-style catapult game using matter.js: drag back a slingshot to launch projectiles at a wobbly block castle guarding little targets, scoring for structures toppled, with a shots-remaining counter and a few levels, in a sunny cartoon palette of green hills and blue sky. Real physics demolition. A retry/next button. Canvas fills and resizes; works on touch.

Build a hypnotic bouncy-ball pit toy using matter.js: pour a cascade of springy colorful balls into a container where they pile, jiggle, and settle, and stirring with the pointer sends them bouncing in a satisfying splash, in a vivid gumball palette on white. Buttons to add more balls and to drain them. Real bouncy physics. Canvas fills and resizes to the viewport; works on touch.

Build an animated bar-chart race using d3 (v7): bars representing categories grow, reorder, and overtake each other smoothly across simulated years, with a big animated year label and value tickers, in a vibrant categorical palette with crisp typography. Inline sample data (no network). Play/pause and a speed control. The SVG sizes responsively to its container and redraws on resize. Works on touch.

Build a zoomable sunburst explorer using d3 (v7): a radial hierarchy of nested arcs you can click to zoom into a branch and click the center to zoom back out, with smooth arc-tween transitions and a warm sequential color scheme by depth. Inline hierarchical sample data (no network). Labels on the larger arcs. SVG sizes responsively to its container and redraws on resize. Works on touch.

Build an interactive chord diagram using d3 (v7): elegant ribbons connecting categories around a circle, where hovering or tapping a group highlights its flows and dims the rest, in a sophisticated palette of jewel tones on a dark backdrop. Inline matrix sample data (no network). A legend around the ring. SVG sizes responsively to its container and redraws on resize. Works on touch.

Build a draggable force-directed network graph using d3 (v7): nodes and links that settle into a pleasing layout under a force simulation, where you can drag nodes around and watch the web rearrange, with node size by degree and a soft glow, in a cool palette of cyan and white on deep navy. Inline sample graph data (no network). Tapping a node highlights its neighbors. SVG sizes responsively and redraws on resize. Works on touch.

Build a brushable scatter-plot explorer using d3 (v7): a colorful cloud of points where dragging a brush selection highlights the enclosed points and shows live stats (count, averages) for the selection, with smooth transitions and a clean modern palette of coral, teal, and slate. Inline sample data (no network). A clear-selection button. SVG sizes responsively and redraws on resize. Works on touch.

Build a radial tree-of-life diagram using d3 (v7): a branching hierarchy laid out radially with smooth curved links, expandable/collapsible nodes on click, and a calming botanical palette of greens and golds. Inline hierarchical sample data (no network). Labels rotate to stay readable. SVG sizes responsively to its container and redraws on resize. Works on touch.

Build a live metrics dashboard using Chart.js: a grid of beautiful animated charts (a streaming line chart, a doughnut, an animated bar, a radar) updating in real time from simulated inline data feeds, in a sleek dark dashboard theme with neon accent lines. Use responsive:true with maintainAspectRatio:false so each chart fills its card and resizes. A pause/resume button. Layout adapts to the viewport; works on touch.

Build a cinematic animated hero showpiece using GSAP: an orchestrated timeline where a logo assembles from scattered shapes, a headline reveals word by word, accent lines draw on, and floating shapes drift in parallax, in a bold modern palette of deep navy, coral, and cream. A replay button restarts the timeline. Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Layout is responsive and fills the viewport; works on touch.

Build a soothing SVG shape-morphing loop using GSAP: a single luminous blob smoothly morphing between organic shapes on an endless eased loop, with a slow color gradient drift through teal, violet, and rose and a soft drop shadow. Tapping nudges the morph to the next shape early. Calm and mesmerizing. Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Responsive, fills the viewport; works on touch.

Build a playful card-shuffle memory game using GSAP: a grid of cards that flip, shuffle, and rearrange with smooth FLIP-style animated transitions as you match pairs, with a moves counter and a win celebration, in a friendly palette of mint, peach, and indigo. Tap two cards to flip and match. Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Responsive grid fills the viewport; works on touch.

Build a delightful staggered-grid reveal toy using GSAP: a grid of tiles that cascade in with eased staggered animation in wave, spiral, or random order (switchable by buttons), each tile a tile of a gradient mosaic in sunset oranges, pinks, and purples. A 'Replay' button re-runs the chosen pattern. Tapping a tile pops it with a bounce. Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Responsive, fills the viewport; works on touch.
